content:
The steam page has some newer images, but the banner is always the original one that present Lily.
Most gacha change the banner to show major updates or important units, a possible thing to consider.

Another is that the video present at the start is only in Chinese, adding at least English text would be useful to emphasize the new higher quality translation and global accessibility.

As the last thing, the videos that play bellow, in the game overview section, are on a low resolution quality, maybe they could be updated to incorporate around 720p quality?

A very highly adequate suggestion, yes, they do listen to these as they changed the youtube channel name to actually have "Morimens" written by the 2nd anniversary.

More visibility like that on steam for the west will surely make the game more inviting and less intimidating when seeing the language no longer clash with the expectation.

I'm never sure if steam pages have an option to make both an EN front and CN front for the game store page, but if they do, having 2 separate would obviously be the win

content:
The way I create/recreate dupe bug so far:
1. Homescreen > Loadout, having a team slot (number X to me)
2. Slot 3 units with covenants and wheels (for now, call them A, B, and C)
3. Go to event stage, choose one of the existed (click on A's slot, choose C)
4. Bug recreated

thread_title: 官方要不要考慮把AUTO放在更顯眼的地方

content:
這邊主要是說星辰篇5章王的那個每損失10%血+50%加固，印象中其他怪物也有類似設計，比如星辰3章王的臨時抗暴buff

簡單來說，這類效果會按單次傷害刷新判定，導致多段傷害設計的角色丢失大量傷害

單擊鎖血至少有手段可以解除，但這種刷新方式傾向是底層邏輯設計，基本無解

所以說可否放寬判定，至少按照一招/一張牌出傷結束後再作刷新判定，而不是現在按照每段出傷進行判定刷新加固

下面再補充一點具體例子
上圖，熔朵單段 由於單段出傷後再刷新加固，傷害完美忽略減傷影響

然後是下圖，蘿坦超限+固傷，吃滿buff，中間開始刷新加固丢失大量傷害

從第一段傷害後，刷新buff，+50%加固

後續傷害砍半，283k+283k+1045k = 累計丢失1611k傷害
下面這張是腐朽壓傷後的0加固固傷，前3段出傷沒達到最大生命10%，沒有刷新加固，固傷沒受到減傷影響，完全出傷後來出加固，傷害反而比上圖還高，這段甚至buff也吃少很多，腐朽降傷+少了100%混沌之獸基傷、少了一張美麗瞬間疊大招傷害，約1000偽力
比較直觀點的面板傷害，這是第一張圖的面板，吃滿buff被刷新加固丢失大量傷害
這是第二張圖的面板，腐朽降傷+少了100%混沌之獸基傷、少了一張美麗瞬間疊大招傷害，約1000偽力(?)

Hello, based on what you've described, we can't quite tell what the issue is. Could you share some screenshots or a screen recording? Any crash pop-ups or error messages would be really helpful!<:pray:1356053116260454534>Also, which step in the process did the issue happen at?

💭「Processing」Communication Visual bug in story
Thanks for the feedback<:Hameln_love:1468257934348783749>  — it's been submitted.

Hello, if your financial situation isn't great right now, you should probably spend your money on more important things — treat the game as a source of fun on the side, not something that adds to your stress.You can take the advice from other players about which packs to buy as a reference.

That said, we really do appreciate your support. Everyone can support the game in their own way — if you've got the means, financial support helps; if you've got time, creating stuff or even just sharing a quick post on social media is already a huge help to us!

Also, just to ease your worries: we're working hard to get better, and we're already on that path toward improvement.

content: 比較建議在局外熟悉、遊戲內作為輔助查看<:please:1356053110375714817>
但問題是有些卡牌是帶虛無的
比如說羊媽狂生出來的
或是一些可能是鑰令生出來帶消耗的
我覺得現在問題是難以辨別哪張有特殊詞條
不是記不記得卡牌效果的問題
是現在這個字體還要等他滑下去才能確認這張牌是不是我想要丟的那張有其他詞條的牌
之前也有反饋過
就說波呂克斯吧
你丟聖心當然得確認這張聖心丟幾次了吧
如果是3/3那還好
他會發光
很好認
但如果是1/3或2/3就得長按一張聖心等他的字體慢慢滑下去才能確認
這個聖心丟了幾次很重要
就說爆發回合要用專屬鑰令抽聖心上來拿額外爆傷
如果丟的是2/3那抽上來就可以立刻觸發3/3的效果
但如果丟的是1/3抽上來也只是2/3
白白浪費一張調和位置
所以確認卡牌具體詞條很重要
建議刪除羊媽、沙耶、鳥哥、神父
